playlist_title: BEAST MODE ⚡ Ultimate Gym Workout Music
playlist_description: The ultimate gym workout playlist designed to take your training to the next level. Featuring high-octane electronic, phonk, and hardstyle tracks for maximum motivation.
playlist_strategy: Progressive energy build-up starting with an active warm-up, pushing to ultra-high intensity for heavy sets and cardio, and concluding with a steady cooldown.

tracks.title: Ignition Sequence
tracks.youtube_title: FOCUS ⚡ Deep House Warm Up Workout | Get In The Zone
tracks.style_summary: Deep atmospheric house with a driving baseline to set the pace.
tracks.song_structure: Intro - Build - Drop - Breakdown - Drop - Outro
tracks.music_generation_prompt: Instrumental gym workout music with hi-fi modern production quality. Genre: Deep House. Subgenre: Tech House. BPM: 120. Key: A Minor. Groove description: Steady, focused, and forward-moving. Bass style: Deep, rolling sub-bass. Drum pattern: Classic 4/4 with crisp hi-hats. Synth textures: Atmospheric pads and subtle plucks. Arrangement hints: Slow build to establish focus before the heavy lifting begins. Strong hook within first 5 seconds featuring a tight bassline. Gym motivation vibe: Setting the mental zone. High energy dynamics but controlled. Clean professional mastering.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic gym photography, athletic fitness aesthetic, waist-up athlete framing. A focused athlete stretching in a modern, subtly lit gym. Cool steel and blue lighting tones, creating a mood of mental preparation. One strong central subject, clear focal point, high contrast lighting, minimal clutter. Deep shadows emphasizing physical definition. Shallow depth of field with atmospheric haze in the background, suitable for parallax animation.
tracks.youtube_description: Get ready to crush your workout with this focused deep house warm-up track! 🎧 Set your intentions and mentally prepare for the heavy lifting ahead. Hit play and step into the zone. 🔥 #GymMusic #WorkoutMotivation #DeepHouse #WarmUp #FitnessJourney
